Q: How many customers are in Brazil?
What are the names of all tracks in the 'Rock' genre?
A: SELECT t."Name" FROM "Track" t JOIN "Genre" g ON t."GenreId" = g."GenreId" WHERE g."Name" = 'Rock';

Q: How many invoices were issued in 2009?
List all customers with their full names and email addresses
What is the total sales amount for each employee's customers?
A: SELECT e."EmployeeId", e."FirstName" || ' ' || e."LastName" AS "EmployeeName", SUM(i."Total") AS "TotalSales" FROM "Employee" e JOIN "Customer" c ON e."EmployeeId" = c."SupportRepId" JOIN "Invoice" i ON c."CustomerId" = i."CustomerId" GROUP BY e."EmployeeId";

Q: Find the most popular genre by number of tracks sold
A: SELECT g."Name", COUNT(il."TrackId") AS "TracksSold" FROM "Genre" g JOIN "Track" t ON g."GenreId" = t."GenreId" JOIN "InvoiceLine" il ON t."TrackId" = il."TrackId" GROUP BY g."Name" ORDER BY "TracksSold" DESC LIMIT 1;

Q: List all tracks that are longer than 5 minutes
How many albums does each artist have?
A: SELECT ar."Name", COUNT(al."AlbumId") AS "AlbumCount" FROM "Artist" ar LEFT JOIN "Album" al ON ar."ArtistId" = al."ArtistId" GROUP BY ar."Name" ORDER BY "AlbumCount" DESC;
